title: astragalus khasianus
intro: Astragalus khasianus, also known as the Khasi astragalus, is a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects. The root of Astragalus khasianus has been traditionally used to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of fatigue and stress, making it beneficial for overall health and well-being. Herbal preparations of Astragalus khasianus include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
